# I Putu Ekajaya Awidya Putra — Full-Stack Engineer

## Overview
This is the portfolio website of I Putu Ekajaya Awidya Putra, a full-stack engineer from Bali, Indonesia, specializing in building scalable, production-ready web applications with modern backend systems and cloud-native infrastructure.

## Key Pages
- Home: https://workofekajaya.com
- Blog: https://workofekajaya.com/blog
- RSS Feed: https://workofekajaya.com/rss.xml

## Expertise
- Backend: Spring Boot (Java), Node.js (Hono), Golang (Fiber)
- Frontend: Next.js, React, Vue, Nuxt, Astro, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Database: PostgreSQL, TimescaleDB, MySQL, Redis
- DevOps: Docker, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, Cloudflare Workers, Vercel, Google Cloud
- Security: Keycloak (OIDC), HMAC validation, QR-based access systems
- Testing: K6 load testing, concurrency simulation

## Languages
- English (IELTS 7.0)
- Indonesian (Native)
- Japanese (Beginner)

## Experience Highlights
- Fullstack Web Developer at Re:creation via PT SUM Digital Konsultan (Dec 2025 – Present)
- Fullstack Web Developer at PT SUM Digital Konsultan (Oct 2024 – Present)
- Junior Software Developer Intern at Geonet.me (Mar – Jun 2023)

## Notable Projects
- Profill.link: High-performance digital identity platform (Astro + Hono, Cloudflare Workers, TimescaleDB analytics)
- Confection Information System: Full-stack web app (Next.js + Golang Fiber, deployed to Google Cloud Run)

## Education
- Bachelor of Information Systems, Stikom Bali Institute of Technology and Business (GPA 3.79/4.0, 2020 — 2024)
